to_buildworld.pivot_target: Open-source developer tools solving Big Tech technical gaps

build_now.description: Git-native prompt regression testing with judge calibration and trace-linked eval scoring for any LLM CI/CD pipeline
build_now.biblical_pattern: PAT-034 — Nehemiah 4:13-14 (guards at gaps in the wall)
build_now.key_differentiator: Judge calibration — validates that your LLM judge agrees with humans on your specific task before trusting it as a CI gate. No other tool has this.
build_now.acquisition_path: OpenAI (complement to Promptfoo acquisition), Anthropic (trust evaluation mission), Microsoft (Copilot quality gap)

build_next.description: Behavioral contract enforcement for LLM function calls — @contract decorator + versioned behavioral specs + CI gate + drift detection
build_next.biblical_pattern: PAT-035 — Acts 2:1-13 (Pentecost — many languages, one coherent message contract)
build_next.key_differentiator: The only library that defines, versions, and enforces behavioral (not just structural) contracts on LLM function calls, provider-agnostic, with drift detection.
build_next.acquisition_path: Anthropic (alignment/trust), OpenAI (complement Promptfoo), Datadog (LLM APM), Pydantic Labs (natural extension)
build_next.status: DESIGN COMPLETE — BUILD AFTER prompt-lock v0.1

build_third.description: CoT reasoning incoherence detector — detects when chain-of-thought reasoning degrades at the Reasoning Horizon (70-85% of chain length)

do_not_build: Agent debugging tools — AgentRx shipped March 12 2026, too crowded
Agent observability — Langfuse, LangSmith, Arize, Opik all exist
Vibe code security — VibeCheck, VibeDoctor, VibeSecurity all exist
Hallucination detection (general) — Lynx, EasyDetect, LibreEval, HaluGate, Maxim all exist
Agent memory — Mem0, LangGraph, CrewAI all addressing this
Fine-tuning data lineage — fine-trace scored 6.30 (below threshold), DVC/MLflow cover it partially
Statistical data drift — Evidently, NannyML, Alibi-Detect, Driftbase all exist

grantpilot_fallback.status: VALIDATED — ready to ship if pivot fails any kill gate
